name: model-evaluation-lab
description: Plans reproducible model evaluations, normalizes benchmark runs, and produces measured model-selection decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, run, normalize, and decide model evaluations.
interface.longDescription: Model Evaluation Lab turns a model choice into a fixed evaluation plan, a reproducible run contract, normalized results, and a decision memo that separates measurement from judgment and deployment conditions.
defaultPrompt: Design a reproducible evaluation for this model decision.
Normalize these raw benchmark results into a stable comparison.
Write a model-selection memo that separates results from judgment.
